text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Matikanefukukitaru's debut has
arrived. With the pressure on, she begins to
crumble.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she is never alone—for she has the gods
on her side!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Remembering this, she offers her prayers with the
utmost grace and makes her way onto the track.
